race.bw_zerg.name: BW Zerg
race.bw_protoss.name: BW Protoss

race.sc2_protoss.name: SC2 Protoss
`{game_mode}` is not yet supported. Only `1v1` is currently available.
queue_setup_embed.field_value.1: 📘 **QUICK START GUIDE:**  [READ THIS BEFORE YOUR FIRST MATCH!]({quickstart_url})
match_confirmed_embed.description.1: Waiting for your opponent to confirm...
match_abort_ack_embed.description.1: You have aborted the match. You will receive a summary shortly.
queue_searching_embed.description.2:
The queue is searching for a game.

- Search interval: 60 seconds
queue_searching_embed.field_value.1: You have been removed from the queue. Check your DMs for match confirmation details.
match_found_embed.description.1:
A match has been found for you.

Press **Confirm Match** to proceed, or **Abort Match** to cancel.
Full match details will be shown once **both** players confirm.
Both players confirmed. Match details are now available below.
match_info_embed.field_value.4:
- Game Privacy: `{privacy}`
- Game Speed: `{speed}`
- Game Duration: `{duration}`
match_info_embed.field_value_pending.4:
- Result: `{result}` ✅
- Waiting for opponent to report...
match_info_embed.footer.1: ℹ️ To report the match result, upload a replay. The dropdown menus below will unlock once a valid replay is uploaded.
match_info_embed.footer.2: ℹ️ Report the match result using the dropdown menus below.
match_aborted_embed.field_value.2: The match was aborted by **{aborter}**. No MMR changes were applied.
match_abandoned_embed.field_value.2: The match was automatically abandoned because **{abandoner}** did not confirm in time.
match_conflict_embed.field_value.2: Both players submitted conflicting reports. The match result has been marked as **conflict** and no MMR changes were applied. Please contact an admin to resolve this.
setup_intro_embed.description.1:
Welcome to EvoLadder! Click **Begin Setup** to configure your player profile.

You will need to provide:
- A **User ID** (your display name on the ladder)
- Your **BattleTag** (e.g. `Username#1234`)
- Your **nationality**, **location**, and **language**
- Optional **alternative IDs**
setup_selection_embed.country_limit_note:
**Due to Discord UI limitations, only 49 common nationalities are listed here.**
- If your nationality is not listed, select **Other** (page 2), then use `/setcountry` to set your exact nationality.
- If you are non-representing, select **Other** (page 2), then use `/setcountry` to select **Non-representing**.
setup_preview_embed.description.1: Please review your setup information before confirming:
setup_success_embed.description.1: Your player profile has been successfully configured.
profile_not_found_embed.description.1: No profile found. Use `/setup` to create your player profile.
terms_of_service_embed.description.1:
Please read our Terms of Service, User Conduct guidelines, Privacy Policy, and Refund Policy. **You must accept these terms in order to use the SC: Evo Complete Ladder Bot.**

**Official Terms of Service:**
🔗 [SC: Evo Ladder ToS]({tos_url})
🔗 [EvoLadderBot ToS (Mirror)]({tos_mirror_url})

By clicking **✅ I Accept These Terms** below, you confirm that you have read and agree to abide by the Terms of Service. You can withdraw your agreement to these terms at any time by using this command again and clicking **❌ I Decline These Terms** below.

**⚠️ Failure to read or understand these terms is NOT AN ACCEPTABLE DEFENSE for violating them, and may result in your removal from the Service.**
terms_of_service_accepted_embed.descript: Thank you for agreeing to the Terms of Service. Welcome to the SC: Evo Complete Ladder Bot!
terms_of_service_declined_embed.descript: You have declined the Terms of Service. As such, you may not use the SC: Evo Complete Ladder Bot.
No country found matching the string "{country}".
set_country_preview_embed.description.1: Please review your nationality selection before confirming:
set_country_confirm_embed.description.1: Your nationality has been updated successfully.
ban_preview_embed.description.1:
You are about to toggle the ban status for:

**User:** {mention} (`{username}` / `{uid}`)

If the user is currently **unbanned**, they will be **banned**.
If the user is currently **banned**, they will be **unbanned**.

Please confirm below.
admin_replay_details_embed.description.1: Summary of the uploaded replay for the match.
resolve_preview_embed.confirm_suffix.1: This will update the match result and MMR. Confirm?
status_reset_preview_embed.description.1:
**Player:** {mention} (`{username}` / `{uid}`)

This will reset the player's state to **idle**, clearing their current match mode and match ID. Use this to fix stuck players.

Confirm?
toggle_admin_preview_embed.description.1:
You are about to toggle the admin role for:

**User:** {mention} (`{username}` / `{uid}`)

- If the user is **not an admin**, they will be **promoted to admin**.
- If the user is an **active admin**, they will be **demoted to inactive**.
- If the user is **inactive**, they will be **re-promoted to admin**.
- **Owners cannot be demoted** through this command.

Please confirm below.
set_mmr_preview_embed.description.1:
You are about to set the MMR for:

**User:** {mention} (`{username}` / `{uid}`)
**Race:** {race_emote} `{race}`
**New MMR:** `{new_mmr}`

This is an **idempotent SET** — the MMR will be overwritten to this exact value.

Please confirm below.
replay_success_embed.description.1: Summary of the uploaded replay for the match.
replay_error_embed.description.1:
The uploaded file could not be parsed as a valid SC2Replay.
Please try again with a different file.
format_verification.races_match.1: - ✅ **Races Match:** Played races correspond to queued races.
format_verification.timestamp_valid.1: - ✅ **Timestamp Valid:** Match started within {diff} min of assignment.
format_verification.timestamp_invalid_af: - ❌ **Timestamp Invalid:** Match started {diff} min **after** assignment (exceeds window).
format_verification.ai_ok.1: - ✅ **No AI Players:** Both players are human.
format_verification.ai_detected.1: - ❌ **AI Player Detected:** ALLOW_AI_PLAYERS = {allow_ai}; an AI player was detected (`{names}`).
format_verification.summary_auto_resolve:
✅ **Verification Complete:** All critical checks passed.
✅ **Match auto-resolved** from replay data. No manual reporting needed.
format_verification.summary_all_ok.1:
✅ **Verification Complete:** All checks passed.
ℹ️ This embed is provided for informational purposes only. Please report the match result manually.
🔓 Match reporting unlocked. Please report the result **using the dropdown menus above.**
format_verification.summary_critical_fai:
❌ **Critical Validation Failure:**
❌ We do not accept games played with the incorrect races, map, or mod.
🔒 Result reporting has been locked. Please contact an admin to nullify this match.
format_verification.summary_issues_unloc:
⚠️ **Verification Issues:** One or more checks failed.
⚠️ Please review the issues above.
🔓 Match reporting unlocked. Please report the result **using the dropdown menus above.**
format_verification.summary_issues_locke:
⚠️ **Verification Issues:** One or more checks failed.
⚠️ Please review the issues above.
🔒 Result reporting has been locked.
setup_modal.error.no_message: An error occurred. Please run `/setup` again.
setup_modal.error.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
setup_selection_view.incomplete_footer.1: Please select a nationality, location, and language before confirming.
error.not_in_dm: This command can only be used in DMs.
error.banned:
Your account has been banned. You cannot use bot commands.
If you believe this is an error, please contact an admin.
error.not_admin: This command is restricted to administrators.
error.not_owner: This command is restricted to bot owners.
error.not_accepted_tos:
You must accept the Terms of Service before using this command.
Use `/termsofservice` to review and accept them.
error.not_completed_setup:
You must complete your player setup before using this command.
Use `/setup` to configure your profile.
error.already_queueing: You are already in the queue.
error.unauthorized: You do not have permission to use this command.
error.unexpected_command:
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
If the problem persists, please contact the developer.
replay_handler.not_in_match: ❌ You are not currently in an active match. Replay uploads are only accepted during an in-progress match.
replay_handler.unexpected_error: ❌ An unexpected error occurred while processing the replay. Please try again.
